form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to her best. Last start 5th (Fr1) over 1609m at this track beaten 16 m by Marin County (1:58.20) in W2BNMT4 on April 8 at $11.86. The run before 5th (Fr3) over 1609m at this track, beaten 16 m by Seven Layer (1:58.00) in W2BNMT4 on April 1 at $16.46. Nicely placed to return to form.
